prompt:
I met a friend yesterday. He mentioned that New York and Beijing are the most beautiful cities he has ever seen.
I don't know this city. Can you tell me where it is located?
response: The city you're asking about is Beijing. Beijing is the capital of the People's Republic of China. It is located in northern China, and it is one of the world's most populous cities. Beijing is situated at the northern tip of the North China Plain, and it is surrounded by hills to the north and the west. The city is approximately 150 kilometers (93 miles) inland from the Bohai Sea. Beijing is a major transportation hub, and it is connected by several high-speed rail lines to other major cities in China. It is also served by Beijing Capital International Airport, one of the busiest airports in the world.

Shanghai is one of the four direct-controlled municipalities of the People's Republic of China, with a population of over 24 million as of 2021, making it the most populous city in China and the most populous city proper in the world. It is a global financial hub and a major cultural and economic center of China.
